nasb.text: The shaft of his spear was like a weaver’s beam, and the head of his spear weighed six hundred shekels of iron; his shield-carrier also walked before him.

esv.text: The shaft of his spear was like a weaver’s beam, and his spear’s head weighed six hundred shekels of iron. And his shield-bearer went before him.

cnv.text: 另外，他手上拿著矛，矛桿有織布的機軸那麼粗，矛頭的鐵重七公斤。還有一個拿大盾牌的人在他前面走。

ccb.text: 戟柄粗如织布机的轴，铁戟头重七公斤。有卫士拿着他的盾牌走在前面。
